mapper.select: select max(day_seq) from t_waste_generate where gen_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
mapper.insert: insert into t_waste_generate (id, category_id, room_id, gen_time, gen_qty, remain_qty, temp_operator, temp_operator_out_name, temp_operator_out_phone, tran_operator, tran_operator_out_name, tran_operator_out_phone, day_seq, batch_no, manual_batch_no, remark) values (#{id}, #{categoryId}, #{roomId}, #{genTime}, #{genQty}, #{genQty}, #{tempOperator}, #{tempOperatorOutName}, #{tempOperatorOutPhone}, #{tranOperator}, #{tranOperatorOutName}, #{tranOperatorOutPhone}, #{daySeq}, #{batchNo}, #{manualBatchNo}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select max(day_seq) from t_waste_reduction where reduction_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
mapper.insert: insert into t_waste_reduction (id, category_id, room_id, reduction_time, reduction_qty, duration, method, operator, operator_out_name, operator_out_phone, day_seq, batch_no, manual_batch_no, remark) values (#{id}, #{categoryId}, #{roomId}, #{reductionTime}, #{reductionQty}, #{duration}, #{method}, #{operator}, #{operatorOutName}, #{operatorOutPhone}, #{daySeq}, #{batchNo}, #{manualBatchNo}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select max(day_seq) from t_waste_storage where storage_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
mapper.insert: insert into t_waste_storage (id, category_id, room_id, storage_time, storage_qty, remain_qty, storage_operator, storage_operator_out_name, storage_operator_out_phone, tran_operator, tran_operator_out_name, tran_operator_out_phone, day_seq, batch_no, manual_batch_no, remark) values (#{id}, #{categoryId}, #{roomId}, #{storageTime}, #{storageQty}, #{storageQty}, #{storageOperator}, #{storageOperatorOutName}, #{storageOperatorOutPhone}, #{tranOperator}, #{tranOperatorOutName}, #{tranOperatorOutPhone}, #{daySeq}, #{batchNo}, #{manualBatchNo}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select max(day_seq) from t_waste_outbound where out_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
mapper.insert: insert into t_waste_outbound (id, out_type, category_id, out_time, out_qty, out_operator, out_operator_out_name, out_operator_out_phone, tran_operator, tran_operator_out_name, tran_operator_out_phone, tran_unit, vehicle_no, disposal_unit, day_seq, batch_no, manual_batch_no, remark) values (#{id}, #{outType}, #{categoryId}, #{outTime}, #{outQty}, #{outOperator}, #{outOperatorOutName}, #{outOperatorOutPhone}, #{tranOperator}, #{tranOperatorOutName}, #{tranOperatorOutPhone}, #{tranUnit}, #{vehicleNo}, #{disposalUnit}, #{daySeq}, #{batchNo}, #{manualBatchNo}, #{remark})

insert into t_waste_flow_rel (flow_type, source_id, target_id, qty) values
(#{item.flowType}, #{item.sourceId}, #{item.targetId}, #{item.qty})
